//: Copy this file to your project repo root as .harness.json and fill in the values. It is the per-project contract mango reads at runtime. SECRETS/TOKENS DO NOT BELONG HERE: keep them in a gitignored .env. .harness.json itself is gitignored by mango's marketplace, but treat it as committed project config — never paste credentials into it.
//rulebook_path: May be a FILE or a DIRECTORY. If a directory, every consumer (reviewer/onboarder agents, grounding skills) reads all *.md inside it. Default to one file so the whole rule set always loads; point at a folder to split later.
test_command: REPLACE_ME (e.g. the single command that runs your test suite or a focused subset)
//work_dir: Directory for mango's per-ticket WORKING DOC (<KEY>.work.md) — the mutable state doc carrying all five phases. Kept SEPARATE from the ticket spec so the challenger's input can exclude it. Defaults to tickets_dir if unset.
//work_doc_mode: Where the working doc lives: auto | separate | embed (default auto). A tracker-hosted ticket always gets a separate <work_dir>/<KEY>.work.md. When the ticket is itself a local file in the repo, auto/embed APPEND the working doc to that file below a raw-ticket separator line (one file, no duplicate); separate always writes a distinct file. The raw ticket portion stays above the separator either way, so the challenger payload can exclude the working doc.
//pr_checklist_path: OPTIONAL path to a project-owned finalise checklist (e.g. a PR-template or definition-of-done file). If set, finalise walks each item and reports satisfied/not-satisfied/N-A with evidence before drafting the PR, surfacing any unmet item at the final gate. mango supplies the mechanism; the project supplies the content. Omit or null to disable.
//stuck_threshold: Circuit-breaker: after this many failed attempts against the SAME proving artifact / failing-test signature, execute and quick STOP and escalate to the user instead of retrying. The counter resets when the failing signature changes. Default 3.
//cost_tier: Model-delegation dial: economy | standard | max (default standard). economy pushes more bulk retrieval to a Haiku worker and avoids Opus on review; max allows Opus on review for high-stakes diffs. Never demotes review/challenger to Haiku. See PRINCIPLES.md routing map.
pr_host: REPLACE_ME (e.g. the host/command used to open a pull request)

tracker.cli: REPLACE_ME (CLI command for ALL tracker writes — comments, transitions; never an MCP)
tracker.read_mcp: REPLACE_ME_OR_NULL (optional read-only MCP server name for ticket READS only)
tracker.//fields: OPTIONAL list of fields to request on a ticket READ, so one read returns the full ticket (some trackers default to a minimal set and return an empty description). If unset, analysis requests a sensible full default (description/body, type, labels, parent, priority).
